title: erysimum cheiranthus subsp. strictum
intro: Erysimum cheiranthus subsp. strictum, also known as strict wallflower, is a plant species within the genus Erysimum, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erysimum cheiranthus subsp. strictum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
